compare 차수별 — 0차 property · 1차 · 2차(제안 방식) · 76문제 (easy·made·ARC-AGI)

2차는 relation 끼리 비교라, 각 property 경로에서 verdict(COMM/DIFF)가 같은지/다른지만 표기 — 속성값·하위비교는 넣지 않는다. 그래서 2차가 폭발하지 않고 property 축으로 평평하게 읽힌다.

1차 — compare(G0,G1) 2개 (경로별 verdict + 값)

compare(P0G0, P0G1)
propertyverdict값1값2
size
heightCOMM99
widthCOMM99
color
0COMMTrueTrue
1DIFFFalseTrue
2DIFFFalseTrue
3DIFFFalseTrue
4DIFFFalseTrue
5DIFFTrueFalse
6COMMFalseFalse
7COMMFalseFalse
8COMMFalseFalse
9COMMFalseFalse
contents
(전체)DIFF[[0, 0, 0, 0,…[[0, 0, 0, 0,…

propertyverdict값1값2
size
heightCOMM99
widthCOMM99
color
0COMMTrueTrue

contents

2차 — compare(1차,1차) 1개 [제안 방식]

compare(1차_P0, 1차_P1) — 제안: verdict끼리 같음/다름만, 하위값 없음
property1차_P01차_P1관계 같음?
size
heightCOMMCOMMCOMM
widthCOMMCOMMCOMM
color
0COMMCOMMCOMM
1DIFFDIFFCOMM
2DIFFDIFFCOMM
3DIFFDIFFCOMM
4DIFFDIFFCOMM
5DIFFDIFFCOMM
6COMMCOMMCOMM
7COMMCOMMCOMM
8COMMCOMMCOMM
9COMMCOMMCOMM
contents
(전체)DIFFDIFFCOMM
⇒ 두 pair 변환이 구조적으로 동일

widthDIFF304
color

2차 — compare(1차,1차) 1개 [제안 방식]

compare(1차_P0, 1차_P1) — 제안: verdict끼리 같음/다름만, 하위값 없음
property1차_P01차_P1관계 같음?
size
heightDIFFDIFFCOMM
widthDIFFDIFFCOMM
color
0COMMCOMMCOMM
1COMMCOMMCOMM
2DIFFCOMMDIFF
3COMMCOMMCOMM
4COMMCOMMCOMM
5DIFFCOMMDIFF
6COMMCOMMCOMM
7DIFFDIFFCOMM
8DIFFDIFFCOMM
9COMMDIFFDIFF
contents
(전체)DIFFDIFFCOMM
⇒ 두 pair 변환이 일부 경로에서 다름

2차 — compare(1차,1차) 1개 [제안 방식]

compare(1차_P0, 1차_P1) — 제안: verdict끼리 같음/다름만, 하위값 없음
property1차_P01차_P1관계 같음?
size
heightCOMMCOMMCOMM
widthCOMMCOMMCOMM
color
0COMMCOMMCOMM
1COMMCOMMCOMM
2COMMCOMMCOMM
3COMMCOMMCOMM
4COMMCOMMCOMM
5COMMCOMMCOMM
6COMMCOMMCOMM
7COMMCOMMCOMM
8DIFFDIFFCOMM
9COMMCOMMCOMM
contents
(전체)DIFFDIFFCOMM
⇒ 두 pair 변환이 구조적으로 동일

195c6913

compare(1차_P0, 1차_P1) — 제안: verdict끼리 같음/다름만, 하위값 없음
property1차_P01차_P1관계 같음?
size
heightCOMMCOMMCOMM

color
0COMMCOMMCOMM
1COMMCOMMCOMM

compare(1차_P0, 1차_P1) — 제안: verdict끼리 같음/다름만, 하위값 없음
property1차_P01차_P1관계 같음?
size
heightCOMMCOMMCOMM
widthCOMMCOMMCOMM
color
0COMMCOMMCOMM
1COMMCOMMCOMM

P0G0
{
 "size": {
  "height": 30,
  "width": 30
